_metadata.title: Indonesian Prescription Drug Database
_metadata.description: Local database of prescription drugs in Indonesia based on UU 17/2023, PP 28/2024, and related regulations
_metadata.author: Pharmacy Reference System
_metadata.disclaimer: This information is for reference, education, and workflow support only. It does not constitute medical advice and must not be used as the sole basis for clinical decisions. Consult qualified healthcare professionals and validated clinical systems for patient care.

primary_law.name: Undang-Undang Nomor 17 Tahun 2023 tentang Kesehatan
primary_law.description: Primary health law; Article 320 classifies drugs into prescription drugs (obat dengan resep) and non-prescription drugs (obat tanpa resep)
prescription_drugs_defined: Obat Keras (Potent/Prescription Drugs) - red circle with 'K'

implementing_regulation.name: Peraturan Pemerintah Nomor 28 Tahun 2024 tentang Peraturan Pelaksanaan UU 17/2023
implementing_regulation.description: Detailed implementing regulation; Pasal 920-922 govern drug classification and prescription requirements

key_articles.920: Drug classification based on safety, risk of misuse, and method of administration
key_articles.921: Categories: prescription drugs (obat keras, narkotika, psikotropika) and non-prescription drugs (obat bebas, obat bebas terbatas)
key_articles.922: Prescription drugs may only be dispensed by pharmacists based on a valid prescription; exceptions for certain 'obat keras tertentu' (selected potent drugs) for self-medication, chronic disease refills, and topical use

ancillary_regulations.name: Keputusan Menteri Kesehatan No. 02396/A/SK/VIII/1986
ancillary_regulations.description: Established the red circle with 'K' marking for 'Obat Keras Daftar G' (Gevaarlijk = dangerous)

ancillary_regulations.name: Permenkes No. 917/MENKES/PER/X/1993
ancillary_regulations.description: Mandatory drug registration; established drug classification framework (obat bebas, obat bebas terbatas, obat wajib apotek, obat keras, psikotropika, narkotika)

ancillary_regulations.name: Permenkes No. 28 Tahun 2022
ancillary_regulations.description: Changes in classification, restrictions, and categories of medicines (e.g., reclassified terbinafine, famotidine, cetirizine from obat keras to obat bebas)

ancillary_regulations.name: Permenkes No. 10 Tahun 2022
ancillary_regulations.description: Classification and reclassification of psychotropic substances (Golongan I-IV)

ancillary_regulations.name: UU No. 35 Tahun 2009 tentang Narkotika
ancillary_regulations.description: Narcotics law; defines Narcotics Golongan I, II, III

ancillary_regulations.name: UU No. 5 Tahun 1997 tentang Psikotropika
ancillary_regulations.description: Psychotropics law; defines Psychotropics Golongan I-IV; non-dependent psychotropics fall under obat keras regulation

ancillary_regulations.name: KepKepBPOM No. 279 Tahun 2024
ancillary_regulations.description: Drug information standards (product information for patients)

ancillary_regulations.name: PerBPOM No. 9 Tahun 2024
ancillary_regulations.description: Guidelines for follow-up on supervision of drugs, narcotics, psychotropics, precursors, and addictive substances

ancillary_regulations.name: PerBPOM No. 14 Tahun 2024
ancillary_regulations.description: Online supervision of drugs and food

prescription_drugs.description: Only available with a valid prescription from a physician, dentist, or veterinarian
prescription_drugs.dispensing_rule: Must be dispensed by a pharmacist (Apoteker) in pharmaceutical service facilities (apotek, RS, puskesmas, klinik)
prescription_drugs.penalty: Up to 12 years imprisonment and/or IDR 5 billion fine for unauthorized distribution (Pasal 435 UU 17/2023)

obat_keras.name: Obat Keras (Prescription Drugs / Potent Drugs)
obat_keras.label: Red circle with black 'K' (formerly 'Daftar G' - Gevaarlijk)
obat_keras.definition: Drugs with high risk requiring medical supervision; potential for misuse and/or require specific administration methods

obat_keras_tertentu.name: Obat Keras Tertentu (Selected Potent Drugs - Exceptions)
obat_keras_tertentu.label: Same red circle 'K' but may be dispensed without prescription by pharmacist
criteria: Drugs for chronic disease refills (resep ulangan)

narkotika.name: Narkotika (Narcotics)
narkotika.label: Red circle with black '+' (palang)
narkotika.definition: Substances from plants/synthetic/semi-synthetic that alter consciousness, reduce pain, and cause dependence

I.description: Not for therapy; high dependence potential; for science only

II.description: Therapeutic as last option; high dependence potential

narkotika.prescription_requirements: Special prescription forms (blanko narkotika); time-limited dispensing

psikotropika.name: Psikotropika (Psychotropics)
psikotropika.label: Red circle with 'K' (same as obat keras, but with additional regulatory controls)
psikotropika.definition: Psychoactive substances affecting CNS that alter mental activity and behavior, with dependence potential

I.description: Not for therapy; very strong dependence; science only

IV.description: Widely used in therapy; mild dependence potential

psikotropika.note: Psychotropics without dependence potential are classified as Obat Keras and follow standard prescription drug regulations

non_prescription_drugs.description: Available without a prescription, but with varying restrictions

obat_bebas_terbatas.name: Obat Bebas Terbatas (Limited OTC)
obat_bebas_terbatas.label: Blue circle border
obat_bebas_terbatas.warning: Has usage restrictions; warning label required (Peringatan: Obat keras dapat menyebabkan ...)

drug_catalog.description: Catalog of common prescription drugs by therapeutic class with regulatory classification

antibiotics.note: All antibiotics are prescription-only in Indonesia to combat antimicrobial resistance

antiinflammatory.classification: Obat Keras / Obat Wajib Apotek / Obat Bebas Terbatas

oncology.note: All chemotherapy and targeted therapy agents are prescription-only

drug_labeling.description: Drug labeling symbols mandated by Indonesian regulations

labels.meaning: Obat Bebas (Over-the-Counter) - no prescription needed, safe for self-medication
Obat Bebas Terbatas (Limited OTC) - caution label required on packaging

labels.symbol: Red circle with black 'K' (Lingkaran Merah dengan huruf K hitam)
labels.meaning: Obat Keras (Prescription Drug) - requires prescription from physician/dentist/veterinarian

labels.symbol: Red circle with black '+' (Lingkaran Merah dengan palang +)
labels.meaning: Narkotika (Narcotic) - strictest control, special prescription form

elements: Physician name, license number (SIP/SKP), signature, and date
Drug name, strength, quantity, and dosage instructions (signa)
valid_prescription.validity_period: Standard prescription valid for 30 days (narcotics and psychotropics may have shorter validity)

electronic_prescription.legal_basis: Pasal 320 UU 17/2023 (resep elektronik diakui setara dengan resep konvensional)
electronic_prescription.requires: Integrated with National Health Information System (SIK)

dispensing_restrictions.max_dispensing: Per prescription as written; refill requires new prescription (except for chronic disease refill program)
Special prescription form (blanko narkotika); limited quantity per prescription
Special prescription form; limited quantity; recording required

obat_wajib_apotek_lists.description: Obat Wajib Apotek (OWA) - certain prescription drugs that can be dispensed by pharmacists without a doctor's prescription

owa_1.name: Daftar Obat Wajib Apotek 1
owa_1.description: Drugs that may be dispensed for self-limiting conditions with specific quantities

owa_2.name: Daftar Obat Wajib Apotek 2
owa_2.description: Additional drugs for self-medication with pharmacist counseling
examples: Salbutamol tablet 2 mg (max 30 tablets) - for asthma

owa_3.name: Daftar Obat Wajib Apotek 3
examples: Warfarin (refill for chronic patients with INR monitoring)

formularium_nasional.description: National Formulary - list of drugs covered by National Health Insurance (JKN/BPJS Kesehatan)
formularium_nasional.note: Only drugs listed in the National Formulary are reimbursable under JKN; primarily prescription drugs

index.description: Quick lookup index: drug name → therapeutic class → regulatory classification
